params._poolManager: (Address of the Uniswap v4 PoolManager) 资金池管理员
params._positionManager: (Address of the Uniswap v4 PositionManager) 头寸管理员
params._router: (Address of the Uniswap v4 router) UniswapV4Router地址,生产环境替换为实际地址

returns.freshWallet: (Address of the newly deployed wallet)返回刷新后的新钱包地址
(Address of the newly deployed wallet)返回刷新后的新钱包地址

swapAndTransfer((address,address,uint24,.details: - Determines swap direction automatically based on `_tokenForTransfer` - Uses swapExactTokensForTokens with `amountOutMin = 0`   (⚠️ unsafe in production due to unlimited price impact) - Transfers min(actualBalance, _amount) to the recipient

params._to: (Recipient of the final token transfer) 最终收到代币的人
params._tokenForTransfer: (ERC20 token address that should be sent to `_to`) 别人最终得到的代币

factory().notice: Factory used to deploy fresh proxy wallets

initFreshWallet().notice: (Deploy a new proxy wallet using CREATE) 使用CREATE刷新钱包地址.

initFreshWallet(bytes32).notice: (Deploy a new proxy wallet using CREATE2 with a deterministic salt.)使用CREATE2刷新钱包地址.

permit2().notice: Permit2 contract (not used directly in this contract yet)

poolManager().notice: Uniswap v4 PoolManager (not used directly yet, but stored for extensions)

positionManager().notice: Uniswap v4 PositionManager (for LP positions, unused here for now)

predictWalletAddress(bytes32).notice: Predict the address of a proxy wallet deployed via CREATE2.

router().notice: Uniswap v4 router used for swaps

swapAndTransfer((address,address,uint24,.notice: Swap all available balance of one pool token into the other         and transfer up to `_amount` of the resulting token to `_to`.         将资金池的所有代币转给别人
